intro: Down a reeking alley, a ring of onlookers roars around a makeshift pit. Money changes hands. A bouncer jerks a thumb at you: in or out?
title: The Fight Club
description: No rules down here. Ante your money and brawl the house fighters - they outnumber you, trap you in the ring, and the handler cheats any way he can. Win and the pot is yours; lose and your ante is gone.
query: Do you step into the ring?

1.label: Step into the ring
1.tooltip: (-) Ante {{smallAnte}}. (?) A smaller, dirty crew. (+) Win the pot.
1.selected: You toss your ante on the table and step into the pit.

2.label: Up the ante
2.tooltip: (-) Ante {{bigAnte}}. (?) A bigger, nastier crew. (+) Win the bigger pot.
2.selected: You slam down the big money. The crowd howls as a whole gang cracks its knuckles.

3.label: Back out
3.tooltip: (-) Walk away from the ring. No bet, no cost.
3.selected: You back out of the alley. Not your kind of fight.

dirtyWarning: No referee, no mercy. The handler grins - his fighters won't play fair.
dirtyEntry: The handler jabs his fighter with a syringe of black-market serum - it swells with stolen power!
